parameters.formDescription: Pick what to buy and how many. 'Dry run' selects without paying. 'Buy for real' charges the card.

values.fieldLabel: What do you want to buy?

parameters.completionMessage: ={{ (() => { const r = $json; const res = Array.isArray(r.results) ? r.results : []; const ok = res.filter(x => x && x.ok).length; const codes = []; for (const x of res) if (x && x.voucher && Array.isArray(x.voucher.vouchers)) for (const v of x.voucher.vouchers) codes.push(v.code); return `${ok}/${res.length} purchase(s) completed` + (res[0] && res[0].dryRun ? ' (dry run — nothing charged)' : '') + (codes.length ? '. Voucher codes: ' + codes.join(', ') : '. Vouchers will arrive by SMS/email.'); })() }}
